news.t: These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only
ProShares Launches First Single-Stock ETF Targeting 2x Daily Returns of Circle Internet Group

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra CRCL (CRCA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x the daily return of Circle Internet Group (CRCL), less expenses. CRCA was launched on Aug 6, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: These SpaceX Funds Are for Active—and Brave—Traders Only
data.text: SpaceX will be risky enough. But new ETFs that give leveraged exposure to the stock on the long or short side are on the way.

data.title: ProShares Launches First Single-Stock ETF Targeting 2x Daily Returns of Circle Internet Group
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares today announced the launch of ProShares Ultra CRCL (NYSE: CRCA)—the first and only ETF designed to target 2x the daily returns of Circle.
